name: Godiva Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter in a double boiler until smooth.
2. Add instant coffee and let cool slightly.
3. Beat eggs and salt together until slightly fluffy.
4. Gradually add sugar and beat the mixture until it forms ribbons (about 10 minutes).
5. Stir in vanilla, Godiva Liqueur, and cooled chocolate mix.
6. Fold in sifted flour until just incorporated.
7. Gently fold in chopped walnuts.
8. Pour batter into a greased, floured, and parchment-lined baking pan measuring 11 inches by 17 inches.
9. Bake at 450 degrees for 20-22 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Yield: Twenty brownies measuring approximately 3 inches by 3 inches.
